ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "yahoo_id" INTEGER /* Yahoo! ID for the player */,
  "cbs_id" REAL /* CBS ID for the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birthdate" REAL /* Birthdate of the player in seconds since the Unix epoch */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College where the player played football */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team (e.g., HOU, SEA) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player holding the position */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., DB, TE) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "primary_position" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the primary position of the player */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Details of the injury if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team affiliation */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the affiliation */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "contract_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of the contract */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the affiliation (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id_home" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_id_away" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., 27-24) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id_away FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_away") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id_home FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_home") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_points_made" INTEGER /* Three-point shots made by the player */,
  "three_points_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-point shots attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
